name_en: Top-tier Original [Exclusive Photo M12172 Blue] As one of Louis Vuitton's classic designs, the Sarah wallet blends Monogram canvas with grained leather lining, recreating the elegance of the envelope style. It features a spacious interior with 2 large compartments, 1 central zip coin pocket, and multiple card slots. Safely stores daily essentials. 19 x 10.5 x 2.5 cm (L x H x W)
